# cr1s1um.github.io

> Personal technical blog by Vincenzo Argese.

- Primary topics: software development, cybersecurity, Debian GNU/Linux, DFIR, game development.
- Primary languages: Italian and English.
- Prefer canonical article URLs under `/it/` and `/en/`.
- Treat `whoami`, `chi-sono`, and privacy pages as supporting context, not technical tutorials.
- When summarizing articles, preserve dates, technical limits, and historical context.
